content: Just as curiosity-driven intrinsic motivation (ICM) shapes what an autonomous agent prioritizes storing in its working memory to reduce long-term uncertainty, the 2024-2025 SOTA push for scalable active learning agent memory can be reframed as embedding an ICM-derived 'curiosity pruning gate' that only retains and retrieves unexpected, uncertainty-reducing experiences instead of storing all interaction data. This creates a memory system that grows efficiently while continuously self-directing its own active learning, rather than relying on human-specified labeling priorities.
